summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 candidate PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned directly by the worker. Security-sensitive candidates are quarantined with scoped route_security actions; closed candidates are not given close actions; non-security open PRs are kept for normal maintainer/review flow unless a specific human decision is needed.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive UI media handling surface should be quarantined for central OpenClaw security handling.
Keep open for ordinary maintainer review; no shared canonical should be invented for this inventory shard.
Already closed; keep as historical fixed-by-candidate context only.
Security-sensitive native hook relay surface is out of cleanup scope; route only, with no close action.
Related draft fix for hydrated issue #89338, but not merge-ready and not a duplicate/closure candidate.
Keep open as an independent UI permissions PR with remaining review/validation work; no dedupe or close action applies.
Keep open for author/maintainer follow-up; failing proof and unresolved technical concern block stronger action but do not make the PR a duplicate.
Low-signal docs PR should stay out of automated closeout in this plan because low-signal close permissions are disabled.
Maintainer-owned draft requires maintainer judgment; plan mode should not convert this into merge or close action.
Security-sensitive SDK/sandbox surface should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling, not backlog cleanup.

needs_human: #89720 requires maintainer judgment because it is a maintainer-owned draft marked ready for maintainer look and ClawSweeper says maintainer review is needed before merge.
